final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original e-commerce hero image for a smartwatch worn on a wrist in an active fitness scenario.

Style/medium: product photography with dynamic motion blur, tech-forward aesthetic, fitness lifestyle editorial
Composition: close-up wrist shot, smartwatch face clearly visible, shallow depth of field isolating the product
Subject: modern smartwatch with digital display, worn on an athletic wrist, showing workout metrics or time
Scene/backdrop: blurred gym environment with indistinct exercise equipment, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: cool-toned tech lighting with blue and cyan accents, high-contrast highlights, energetic and futuristic atmosphere
Color palette: cool blues and cyans as dominant tones, neutral grays from gym equipment, subtle warm skin tone accents
Materials/textures: brushed metal smartwatch case, smooth silicone band, sweat droplets on skin, matte gym floor texture
Avoid: warm golden hour lighting, over-sharpening, watermark, generic stock photo feel, cluttered background details
